details: Mandate: BUILD and MEASURE NoC-mcast KV read-once variant of SDPA on Blackhole. Override prior roofline-only STOP. Target shape 1x10x9472x128 bf16 MHA self-attn non-causal.

Read perf_findings, op_design, program_descriptor, reader/compute/writer kernels, mcast_pipe.hpp, and studied shared_input_reuse reference. Mcast requires KV-outer restructure: each core holds multiple q-chunk (m,l,O) states resident; injector reads KV once per head and mcasts to group rectangle. Plan: dedicated guarded mcast reader+compute+writer, existing Q-outer path untouched.

Wrote 3 mcast kernels: mcast_compute (KV-outer, MAX_SUBCHUNK=4 resident state, unfused helpers + fast_exp), mcast_reader (IS_SENDER + mcast_bcast flags, Mcast1D one family K then V), mcast_writer (drains q_cnt output blocks). Next: descriptor guarded branch with Mcast1D PerRow wiring.

First run FAILED: TT_FATAL Program size 133968 > kernel config buffer 70656 (compute binary too big from 4x unroll). Rewrote compute as SINGLE code path: rotating state CBs (row_max/row_sum/out_accum hold q_cnt blocks, one rotation per KV chunk) + In0SourceFn to read q_scaled[s] via runtime CB index. CB count 28->21. Re-testing.

Root cause: OperandKind::Block indexes held operand ABSOLUTELY (base+i, slot 0), not front-relative -> stale read on rotating multi-block ring for q_cnt>=2. Fix: pop cb_row_max front into depth-1 cb_m_old scratch before held/Block math; normalize recips into cb_l_tmp scratch. q_cnt=1 already correct. Now PCC~0.9997 on (1,2,3072,64),(1,1,4096,64),(1,3,3072,128).

All correctness green: target (1,10,9472,128) perf test PCC>=0.997; 13 main unit tests (baseline path, no regression); 6 mcast tests incl target + golden long-context (4096/8192) under --dev (no hang/race). Target uses Skv_chunk_t=4 (74 KV chunks), subchunk=4.
